Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Ah, le deuxième is simple. There is a few people who harbor sentiments négatifs for who I am. Someone has gone through my things at night, too, and did not leave them in good condition.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I spite them with mes drapeaux. For any that they take down, I put up une version plus grande.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I think I may know who l'auteur principal is.

Line.Text: Whatever the answer, he isn't providing it. He just shakes his head to himself.
